form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th on April 10 over 400m at this track behind Stop It Zipper beaten 5 lengths (23.37) in a Grade 4/5. The form from the last run stacks up nicely. Worth following up.

form.formComment: Racing well without winning, recording five minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when second (29.92) over 515m at Gosford. Expected to go very well.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together ounding the turn into the back straight and shifted wide.

form.formComment: Ran a better race when third behind Kalani Sea at this track last start over 400m (23.40). Has to be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Ran a better race when third behind Kalani Sea at this track last start over 400m (23.40). Has to be included.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 400m in 22.97. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 400m at this track at Grade 5 level. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 400m at this track. Happy to risk this time.

form.formComment: Finished fifth (23.01) last start at Maitland. Prior to that had recorded three minor placings in a row. Tough draw to overcome and will need to find best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Rounding the first turn, shifted inwards and came together.

form.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when third over 401m at Richmond. That followed a win two back in 19.57 beating Major Ted over 340m at Bulli. Not far from winner last time but has the job ahead here.
